name: storage-growth
title: Storage Footprint & Growth
subtitle: size by source, growth by tier & usage vs quota
description: A storage showcase — a size treemap, a stacked-area growth trend by tier, usage-vs-quota bullets, and the fastest-growing sources.

dataAccesses.name: StorKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1099511627776.0,1) AS total_tb, ROUND(SUM(dup_savings_bytes)/1099511627776.0,1) AS reclaimable_tb, ROUND(100.0*SUM(size_bytes)/NULLIF(SUM(quota_bytes),0),0) AS quota_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT datasource_type) AS sources FROM entity_storage_demo

dataAccesses.name: SizeBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1099511627776.0,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GrowthByTier
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tier='Hot' THEN size_bytes END)/1099511627776.0,1) AS hot, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tier='Warm' THEN size_bytes END)/1099511627776.0,1) AS warm, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tier='Cold' THEN size_bytes END)/1099511627776.0,1) AS cold FROM fact_temperature_daily t JOIN dim_date d ON t.date_key=d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: UsageVsQuota
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1099511627776.0,1) AS used_tb, ROUND(SUM(quota_bytes)/1099511627776.0,1) AS quota_tb FROM entity_storage_demo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 6

dataAccesses.name: TopGrowers
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(AVG(mom_growth_pct),1) AS growth FROM v_source_growth GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8

kpis.label: Reclaimable (TB)
kpis.info: Duplicate data that could be reclaimed.

panels.title: Storage by Source
panels.info: Footprint per source platform, sized by volume.

panels.title: Growth by Tier
panels.info: How the footprint grows across storage tiers over time.

panels.title: Usage vs Quota
panels.info: Which sources are approaching their quota.
